gaps.description: Existing task schema lacks several canonical operational loop contract fields.
Existing result schema lacks originating task, governance status, semantic boundary, and next-step fields.
Replay records lack explicit operational contract stage field.
Validation exists but no standalone governance admissibility artifact exists.
No governed result interpretation package exists for semantic interpretation continuity.
Next-step synthesis is not represented as a loop artifact.
Sidepanel has no dedicated provider boundary panel.
Existing schema names differ from canonical contract names but remain semantically safe.

deferred: Semantic replay completeness remains intentionally deferred.

recommended_next_implementation: Create OPERATIONAL_LOOP_PACKAGE_MAPPING_V1 as a narrow schema-mapping artifact, preferably as a separate loop envelope over existing AGOL Bridge task/result packages before any schema or runtime changes.
